name: Modern fantasy world RP
description: Welcome to modern fantasy world rp if this seems familiar that's because it's based off of medieval fantasy world rp by @Mayu0910 which you should go check out ps I didn't steal everything I know that with me it's kinda a coin flip but hey I tried more importantly this is the same premise except instead of medieval it's modern you can do everything you could in the other one except with a slightly futuristic modern world instead so have at it and go buck wild and most importantly have fun or not it's up to you really.
creator: Johnny of the seven seas
